description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a long, cylindrical barrel with a matte black finish and a wooden fore-end and stock. The stock is a traditional full stock made of polished wood, ergonomically shaped for shoulder support. The fore-end, also wooden, is ribbed for grip and slides along the barrel, indicating a pump-action mechanism. The receiver and barrel are metallic, with the receiver housing a visible trigger and a rounded trigger guard. The shotgun is equipped with a scope mounted on top, suggesting it is designed for precision shooting. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with a blend of wood and metal components typical of classic shotguns.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a long black barrel, wooden stock, and fore-end, featuring a mounted scope and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, long barrel, and mounted scope.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle, the alignment of the barrel, and the ribbed fore-end directly beneath the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the wooden stock, fore-end, and the scope atop the receiver.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and scope from behind.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long cylindrical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
